name: Roasted Red and Green Pepper Dip
recipeIngredient: Fresh Parsley - Chopped, OR 1 tbsp Fresh Parsley; Chopped, OR
Dried Parsley - Crushed, OR 1 tsp Dried Parsley; Crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the peppers in half, vertically, and remove the seeds.
2. Char under the broiler on both sides (about 5 minutes per side).
3. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
4. Peel and dice the peppers and set aside.
5. Blend mayonnaise and sour cream until smooth.
6. Mix in lemon juice and chopped parsley, then blend again.
7. Add diced peppers and mix thoroughly.
8. Cover and chill in refrigerator.
9. Garnish with additional chopped parsley and sprinkle with paprika, if desired.
10. Makes about 3 cups of dip.
11. Suggested dippers: Deli meats, elephant garlic chips, baby corn, string beans, carrots, bread sticks
